markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session to discuss and plan Vapi's content and SEO strategy with GrowthX Labs.](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is developing a comprehensive strategy focusing on editorial content, programmatic page creation, and website health optimization](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [The approach aims to establish Vapi as an authority in voice AI, targeting both high-volume and high-intent keywords](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Plans include creating use case pages, feature pages, and potentially a catalog of customer applications to drive traffic and showcase Vapi's capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)

## Topics

### Current Website Audit and Quick Wins

  - [Over 90% of traffic comes from branded searches](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [Many pages are not properly indexed due to linking directly to homepage sections](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Immediate fixes: Create separate pages for better indexing, add CTAs, improve internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)

### Content Strategy Overview

  - [Aim: Be effective before efficient, focusing on thoughtful, strategic content creation](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
  - [Approach: Combine editorial content with programmatic page generation](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Goal: Create a "knowledge graph" for Vapi, similar to successful examples like GoodRx (30,000 pages)](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)

### Programmatic Content Generation

  - [Creating thousands of landing pages based on various combinations (roles, functions, verticals)](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Focus on zero-volume opportunities that anticipate future search trends in voice AI](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Structure: Flat hierarchy with tags for easy navigation and search engine understanding](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)

### Editorial Content Strategy

  - [Develop feature pages, use case pages, and in-depth technical content](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Balance between broad topics (e.g., "AI voice") and specific, high-intent keywords](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Potential topics: compliance (e.g., HIPAA), benchmarking, technical deep-dives](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)

### User Experience and Demonstration

  - [Plan to create interactive demos of voice agents on use case pages](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Challenge: Need to work on embedding functional agents directly on pages](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)

### Competitive Analysis

  - [Brief mention of competitor (Retail AI) having basic pages for various use cases](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
  - [Acknowledgment that Vapi's strategy will go beyond this level of implementation](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to deliver detailed editorial strategy and initial content plan by next week](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
  - [Begin work on website health optimizations and template development for use case pages](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [Schedule deeper strategy session on Monday to discuss tradeoffs and prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
  - [Vapi to provide access to landing page repository for GrowthX to start making changes](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [Explore technical solution for embedding functional voice agents on landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/mPYyBhiTDB6KmCGoygFzDMWm3zGx8o5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)
